meaning: adj.(指权力)无限的、绝对的,(指会议)全体出席的,充分的,完全的
examples: The new committee holds its first plenary session this week.
The Council has plenary powers to administer the agreement.
The plenary breaks up to talk about it and have lunch.
Professor Thomas is regularly invited to give plenary and keynote presentations at various conferences worldwide.
Read more here at Democracy Live's guide to the European Parliament plenary sessions.
